name: Application Developer Intern
description: Developed features for a web banking application using TypeScript, Angular, RxJS, SCSS, and Bootstrap.
Built reusable UI components and implemented service-based architecture patterns for scalability.
Refactored legacy components to improve maintainability and performance.
Implemented responsive, accessible interfaces using WAI-ARIA and cross-browser compatibility practices.
Wrote and maintained unit tests with Jest and participated in code reviews to ensure code quality.
Translated Figma designs into responsive, production-ready UI components while collaborating in Agile sprints.
